steps.title: Identify what constitutes a 'difference' in the notes
steps.content: To emphasize a difference, the choice must contrast the two keepers. The notes show distinct facts about each: locations (Maryland vs. California) and tenure dates. Lusby's dates (1844–1862) and Austin's dates (1925–1941) reveal they worked roughly 80 years apart, in different centuries — a clear, explicit difference.

steps.title: Find the choice that explicitly contrasts both keepers
steps.content: Choice C directly compares them: Lusby worked in an “earlier century” than Austin. Choices A, B, and D fail to compare the keepers — A emphasizes their similarity while B and D each name only one. That matches choice C — C is correct.
